title: Changelog
excerpt: All notable changes to WikiNest are listed here in reverse chronological order.

title: WikiNest
excerpt: **Your team's knowledge base, version-controlled and always in sync.**

title: Welcome to WikiNest
excerpt: WikiNest is a git-native wiki: your documentation lives in the `docs/` folder of a GitHub or GitLab repository. Every page is a Markdown fil

title: Feature Playground
excerpt: This page demonstrates WikiNest-specific features in action. Everything you see here — the tags above, the author attribution, the links bel
author: WikiNest Team

title: Folder structure
excerpt: Pages in WikiNest map directly to files in the `docs/` directory. The sidebar tree mirrors the directory structure.

title: Internationalization
excerpt: WikiNest supports multiple UI languages. Page content language is not managed — write pages in any language you want.

title: YAML
excerpt: This page demonstrates every markdown feature supported by WikiNest. Use it to verify rendering and as a copy-paste reference when writing d

title: Configuration
excerpt: WikiNest is configured through two places: `config.json` in the repository root, and the settings UI in the browser.

title: GitLab Setup
excerpt: This guide walks through deploying WikiNest using GitLab as your backend. For GitHub, see [[Installation]].

title: Installation
excerpt: WikiNest requires no build step. Fork the repository, enable GitHub Pages, configure your token — done in under 5 minutes.

title: Meeting Notes
